Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER RICHARD CHAPMAM'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. Any entitlement to additional fees or costs must be pursued separately. Petition to correct or vacate arbitration award is denied. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
